job.title: Augmented Reality User Experience Analyst
job.description: InnovateAR Solutions is at the forefront of creating immersive augmented reality experiences. We are seeking an Augmented Reality User Experience Analyst to join our team. This entry-level role combines skills from UX design, data analysis, and AR technology to enhance user interactions within our applications. You will work closely with our design and development teams to analyze user behavior, gather insights, and suggest improvements for our AR experiences.

required_skills: Basic knowledge of AR development tools (e.g., Unity, ARKit, or ARCore)
Experience with user interface (UI) design principles
Proficiency in data analysis software (e.g., Excel, Google Analytics)
Understanding of user research methodologies (e.g., surveys, interviews)
Familiarity with wireframing and prototyping tools (e.g., Figma, Sketch)
Strong written and verbal communication skills
Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment
Detail-oriented and able to manage multiple tasks
preferred_skills: Basic programming skills in languages such as JavaScript or C#
Experience with graphic design software (e.g., Adobe Creative Suite)
Familiarity with agile project management tools (e.g., Jira, Trello)
requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Human-Computer Interaction, or a related field

job.title: Telehealth Support Specialist
job.description: HealthConnect Innovations is seeking a motivated Telehealth Support Specialist to join our dynamic team. This entry-level position combines elements of healthcare assistance, customer service, and technology support to enhance patient experiences in a rapidly growing telehealth environment. As a Telehealth Support Specialist, you will assist patients in navigating our telehealth platform, troubleshoot technical issues, and coordinate with healthcare providers to ensure seamless virtual care delivery.

required_skills: Proficiency in using telehealth software platforms (e.g., Zoom for Healthcare, Doxy.me)
Strong verbal communication skills for patient interactions
Ability to troubleshoot common technical issues (e.g., connectivity problems)
Familiarity with patient scheduling and electronic health record (EHR) systems
preferred_skills: Experience with customer service in a healthcare setting
Knowledge of HIPAA compliance and patient confidentiality practices
Basic data entry skills for maintaining patient records
Understanding of remote patient monitoring tools
requirements.education: Associate degree in Health Information Technology, Nursing, or related field
